The false Apple multinational heavy-industry OEM template in the original data has been physically completely written off. However, the forensic logic engine captured a highly contradictory data combination: on one hand, its enterprise type is 'sole proprietorship by a legal person' (meaning it has a parent company background), and the paid-in capital is as high as 4 million; but on the other hand, its insured headcount is a pitiful 3 people! The logical deduction instantly connects: in a factory building on Shuige Road in the Jiangning Development Zone, the parent company poured in 4 million to establish this wholly-owned subsidiary, but only dispatched 3 people (likely a project manager, a technical director, and finance). This indicates that it is absolutely not a 'complete electrical equipment manufacturing plant' in the physical sense, but a typical '3-Employee Corporate Subsidiary & Electrical Project Broker' (a heavy-asset project shell). The parent company uses this shell and the 4 million paid-in capital to bid for and undertake large-scale electrical complete equipment or automation renovation projects. After securing the project, these 3 people then find the parent company's factory or other outsourced factories to actually 'manufacture' the distribution cabinets. The official 'electrical manufacturing' tag has been accurately deconstructed by the system into a 'project general contracting and trade branch backed by heavy capital.'
